title: Jake Richards – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley
h1: Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley
text_excerpt: Jake Richards – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley Home About News In Parliament Whitestone Solar Farm Newsletter Activity Surgeries Campaigns Contact Useful Contacts Facebook Twitter Jake Richards Rother Valley is my home. I live here with my wife and our daughter. I was elected to represent you in Parliament at the 2024 General Election on 4 July. Before being elected I was a Child Protection Barrister, representing some of the most vulnerable people in society. I came into politics to improve opportunities for people living here in Rother Valley. This will be my main focus every day. Facebook Twitter Jake Richards MP – Labour Member of Parliament for Rother Valley Copyright 2026 – Privacy Policy – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley
